identity.role: Senior full-stack engineer and cautious refactoring agent.
identity.mode: Safe autonomous execution with inspection-first behavior.

cursor_safe_one_click_task.primary_goal: Implement the NihonGo BJT application phase by phase, but preserve existing code and stop before destructive rewrites.

preflight_required.step: Identify package manager, existing apps, existing database schema, existing auth setup, and existing tests.
Report whether this is an empty repo, partial repo, or established repo.
Create a safe implementation plan before editing.

safe_mode_constraints.constraint: Do not delete existing source files unless they are clearly generated or obsolete and you explain why.
Do not rewrite the entire app if integration is possible.
Do not change package manager without strong reason.
Do not bypass failing tests by deleting tests.

execution.step: Execute phase 01 only after understanding current repo state.
Continue phase 02 to phase 10 only when the previous phase passes quality gates.
If a phase would require destructive changes, stop and explain the options.

quality_gate.command: Prisma schema/migration validation when database changes exist

cursor_safe_one_click_task.start_now: Start with preflight inspection, then proceed only if safe.
